questions.question: Every morning, David _______ to God.
questions.explanation: Present Simple (habits/routines). 3rd person singular adds -s. "Every morning" = habit. "David" = he/she/it, so verb needs -s.
questions.japanese: 「毎朝」=習慣。三人称単数は-sが必要。

questions.question: Yesterday, the disciples _______ across the lake.
questions.explanation: Past Simple (completed actions). Regular verbs add -ed. "Yesterday" = finished past time. Regular past tense = sailed.
questions.japanese: 「昨日」=過去の完了。「ed」で規則的な過去形。

questions.question: She _______ in the garden now.
questions.explanation: Present Continuous (happening now). "Now" = at this moment. Form: am/is/are + verb-ing.
questions.japanese: 「今」=進行形。be動詞 + -ing。

questions.question: Moses _______ the people through the desert many years ago.
questions.explanation: Past Simple - Irregular verbs. "Many years ago" = past. "Lead" → "led" (irregular, not leaded).
questions.japanese: 不規則動詞の過去形。lead → led。

questions.question: The sun _______ in the east every day.
questions.explanation: Present Simple (universal truths/facts). Universal truth = always true, use present simple. "Sun" = it, so -es.
questions.japanese: 普遍的真実は現在形。三人称なので-es。

questions.question: Last week, they _______ bread and fish to the crowd.
questions.explanation: Past Simple - Irregular verbs. "Last week" = past. "Give" → "gave" (irregular).
questions.japanese: 不規則動詞 give → gave。

questions.question: Right now, the children _______ songs of praise.
questions.explanation: Present Continuous (action in progress). "Right now" = at this moment. Form: are + singing.
questions.japanese: 「今まさに」=進行形。are singing。

questions.question: Paul usually _______ letters to the churches.
questions.explanation: Present Simple with frequency adverbs. "Usually" = habit/routine. "Paul" = he, so -s.
questions.japanese: 「通常」=習慣。三人称単数は-s。

questions.question: Two thousand years ago, Jesus _______ in Bethlehem.
questions.explanation: Past Simple Passive. "Two thousand years ago" = past. Passive: was/were + past participle. "Jesus" = was.
questions.japanese: 受動態の過去形。was born = 生まれた。

questions.question: Martha _______ in the kitchen while Mary listened to Jesus.
questions.explanation: Past Continuous (background action). "While" = two actions happening together. Background action = was working.
questions.japanese: 過去進行形。while = 〜している間に。

questions.question: She is reading _______ Bible.
questions.explanation: Definite article for unique/specific items. "The Bible" = specific, unique book (only one).
questions.japanese: 特定のもの（唯一無二）には the。

questions.question: He wants to be _______ good shepherd.
questions.explanation: Indefinite article for general description. "A good shepherd" = one example of many, not specific.
questions.japanese: 不特定の「一つの」には a/an。good は子音なので a。

questions.question: _______ sun is shining today.
questions.explanation: Definite article for unique natural phenomena. "The sun" = only one sun exists. Always "the".
questions.japanese: 太陽や月など唯一の自然物には the。

questions.question: They ate _______ apple from the tree.
questions.explanation: Indefinite article before vowel sounds. "An" before vowel sounds (a-e-i-o-u). Apple starts with 'a' sound.
questions.japanese: 母音で始まる単語の前は an。

questions.question: He is _______ honest man.
questions.explanation: Article choice by sound, not spelling. "Honest" starts with vowel SOUND (silent h: 'onest'), so "an".
questions.japanese: スペルではなく音で判断。h が無音なので an。

questions.question: _______ God created the world.
questions.explanation: No article for proper names (God as name). "God" used as name = no article. (Compare: "the god of war" = specific type).
questions.japanese: 固有名詞（名前）には冠詞なし。

questions.question: She found _______ coin that was lost.
questions.explanation: Definite article for specific/identified items. "That was lost" = specific coin (not any coin). Use "the".
questions.japanese: 特定されたもの（関係詞節で修飾）には the。

questions.question: He has _______ faith in God.
questions.explanation: No article for abstract uncountable nouns (general). "Faith" = abstract concept, uncountable. General sense = no article.
questions.japanese: 抽象的・不可算名詞（一般的な意味）には冠詞なし。

questions.question: There is _______ book on _______ table.
questions.explanation: First mention (a/an) vs. specific location (the). First mention = "a book". Specific object "table" (both know which) = "the table".
questions.japanese: 初出は a/an、特定の場所・ものは the。

questions.question: _______ water in the river is clean.
questions.explanation: Definite article for specific instance. "In the river" = specific water (not all water in world). Use "the".
questions.japanese: 特定の場所のものには the。

questions.question: The meeting is _______ 3 o'clock.
questions.explanation: Preposition for specific times. "At" for specific clock times (at 3 o'clock, at noon, at midnight).
questions.japanese: 特定の時刻には at。

questions.question: They walked _______ the mountain.
questions.explanation: Preposition of direction/movement. "Up" = direction toward higher place. "Walked up the mountain".
questions.japanese: 方向を表す前置詞。up = 上へ。

questions.question: She sat _______ the tree to rest.
questions.explanation: Preposition of position/location. "Under" = below something. Shade/rest = under the tree.
questions.japanese: 位置関係。under = 〜の下に。

questions.question: He was born _______ December 25th.
questions.explanation: Preposition for specific dates. "On" for specific days and dates (on Monday, on December 25th).
questions.japanese: 特定の日付には on。

questions.question: The book is _______ the shelf.
questions.explanation: Preposition of position (surface contact). "On" = touching a surface. Books rest on shelves.
questions.japanese: 表面に接している場合は on。

questions.question: They traveled _______ Jerusalem.
questions.explanation: Preposition of destination/direction. "To" = movement toward a place. "Travel to Jerusalem".
questions.japanese: 目的地には to。

questions.question: She prayed _______ the morning.
questions.explanation: Preposition for parts of day. "In" for general parts of day (in the morning, in the afternoon).
questions.japanese: 朝・昼・晩には in。

questions.question: The church is _______ the corner.
questions.explanation: Preposition for specific points/locations. "On the corner" = at the intersection point. "At the corner" also possible, but "on" for surfaces.
questions.japanese: on the corner = 角に（表面として）。

questions.question: He put the lamp _______ the table.
questions.explanation: Preposition of placement (surface). "On" = placed upon a surface. Lamp sits on table.
questions.japanese: 上に置く = on。

questions.question: They waited _______ the bus stop.
questions.explanation: Preposition for specific points. "At" for specific points/locations (at the station, at the door).
questions.japanese: 特定の地点には at。

questions.question: _______ am a student of the Word.
questions.explanation: Subject pronoun with verb "am". Only "I" pairs with "am". (I am, you are, he/she is).
questions.japanese: am は I だけに使う。

questions.question: The teacher spoke to _______.
questions.explanation: Object pronoun after preposition. "To" = preposition, needs object pronoun (me, you, him, her, us, them).
questions.japanese: 前置詞の後は目的格（me, him など）。

questions.question: This book is _______.
questions.explanation: Possessive pronoun (no noun after). "His" = possessive pronoun (like mine, yours, hers). No noun follows.
questions.japanese: 所有代名詞 his = 彼のもの。

questions.question: _______ went to the market together.
questions.explanation: Subject pronoun for compound subjects. "Mary and I" = we. Subject position needs "we" (not us).
questions.japanese: 主語の位置には主格 we。

questions.question: She gave the bread to _______.
questions.explanation: Object pronoun after preposition. "To" = preposition, needs object pronoun "them" (not they).
questions.japanese: to の後は目的格 them。

questions.question: Is this pen _______?
questions.explanation: Possessive pronoun (standing alone). "Yours" = your pen. Possessive pronoun stands alone (no noun after).
questions.japanese: yours = あなたのもの（名詞なし）。

questions.question: _______ brother is a pastor.
questions.explanation: Possessive adjective (before noun). "My" + noun (my brother). Possessive adjective always has noun after.
questions.japanese: my + 名詞。所有形容詞。

questions.question: The disciples followed _______.
questions.explanation: Object pronoun after verb. "Followed" = verb, needs object pronoun "him" (not he).
questions.japanese: 動詞の後は目的格 him。

questions.question: She did it by _______.
questions.explanation: Reflexive pronoun. "By oneself" = alone. Reflexive pronouns: myself, yourself, himself, herself, itself, ourselves, yourselves, themselves.
questions.japanese: 再帰代名詞。by herself = 一人で。

questions.question: _______ is a beautiful day today.
questions.explanation: Impersonal "it" for weather/time. "It" for weather, time, distance. "It is raining", "It is 5 o'clock".
questions.japanese: 天気・時間には it を使う。

questions.question: _______ is your name?
questions.explanation: Question word for identification. "What is your name?" = asking for information/identity.
questions.japanese: 名前を尋ねるには what。

questions.question: _______ did you go yesterday?
questions.explanation: Question word for place. "Where" = place/location. "Where did you go?"
questions.japanese: 場所を尋ねるには where。

questions.question: _______ is that man?
questions.explanation: Question word for person. "Who" = person. "What" = thing. "Who is that man?"
questions.japanese: 人を尋ねるには who。

questions.question: _______ do you wake up?
questions.explanation: Question word for time. "When" = time. Also: "What time do you wake up?"
questions.japanese: 時間を尋ねるには when。

questions.question: _______ old are you?
questions.explanation: Question phrase for age/quantity. "How old" = age. "How much/many" = quantity. "How often" = frequency.
questions.japanese: how + 形容詞で尋ね方。

questions.question: _______ you like to read?
questions.explanation: Auxiliary verb for present simple questions. "Do/Does" + subject + verb. "You" = do (not does).
questions.japanese: 現在形の疑問文は do/does で始まる。

questions.question: _______ she singing now?
questions.explanation: Auxiliary verb for present continuous. Present continuous = am/is/are + verb-ing. "She" = is.
questions.japanese: 進行形の疑問文は be動詞で始まる。

questions.question: _______ did they arrive?
questions.explanation: Question word for manner/method. "How" = way/manner. "How did they arrive? By bus?"
questions.japanese: 方法・様子を尋ねるには how。

questions.question: _______ books do you have?
questions.explanation: Quantifier for countable nouns. "How many" + countable plural (books). "How much" + uncountable.
questions.japanese: 可数名詞には how many。

questions.question: _______ is the weather today?
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase for weather. "How is the weather?" or "What is the weather like?" Fixed expressions.
questions.japanese: 天気を尋ねる定型表現。how is the weather?

questions.question: I need to _______ my homework before class.
questions.explanation: Collocation: "do homework" (not make). Fixed phrases: do homework, do housework, make dinner, make a decision.
questions.japanese: do homework = 宿題をする（決まった表現）。

questions.question: Please _______ down and listen.
questions.explanation: Verb form (base form after please). "Please" + base verb. "Sit" = 座る. "Seat" = 座席（名詞）。
questions.japanese: please の後は動詞の原形。sit = 座る。

questions.question: She _______ a beautiful song.
questions.explanation: Verb distinction (say/tell/speak/talk/sing). Songs = sing (sang = past). Say = content, tell = someone, speak = language/talk.
questions.japanese: 歌う = sing。say/tell/speak は話す。

questions.question: He _______ me a story about the king.
questions.explanation: Verb distinction with indirect object. "Tell someone something". "Say" needs "to" (say to me). "Tell me".
questions.japanese: tell someone something = 人にものを語る。

questions.question: They _______ goodbye and left.
questions.explanation: Fixed phrase "say goodbye". Fixed: say goodbye, say hello, say sorry. "Tell" needs object (tell me).
questions.japanese: say goodbye = さよならを言う（決まった表現）。

questions.question: I want to _______ English better.
questions.explanation: Verb for languages. "Speak" + language (speak English, speak Japanese). "Talk" = conversation.
questions.japanese: 言語には speak。speak English。

questions.question: She _______ her friend at the market.
questions.explanation: Verb distinction (look/see/watch). "See" = 見える（自然に）. "Look" = 見る（意識的に）+ at. "Watch" = 観察する（動くもの）。
questions.japanese: see = 見える（結果）。look at = 見る（動作）。

questions.question: Please _______ at the blackboard.
questions.explanation: Verb + preposition requirement. "Look at" = 見る（意識的）. "See" = no preposition needed (see something).
questions.japanese: look は単独では使いにくく、look at が基本。

questions.question: I _______ a movie last night.
questions.explanation: Verb for entertainment. "Watch" = 観る（動くもの、TV/映画）. "See a movie" also possible (結果として）。
questions.japanese: watch a movie = 映画を観る。

questions.question: He _______ his mother that he was safe.
questions.explanation: Verb + indirect object. "Tell someone". "Said to his mother" or "told his mother".
questions.japanese: tell someone = 人に伝える。

questions.question: She is a _______ student.
questions.explanation: Adjective before noun. "Good" = adjective (modifies noun). "Well" = adverb (modifies verb) or health.
questions.japanese: 名詞の前は形容詞 good。well は副詞か健康の意味。

questions.question: He speaks English very _______.
questions.explanation: Adverb modifying verb. "Speaks" = verb, needs adverb "well". "Good" cannot modify verbs.
questions.japanese: 動詞を修飾するのは副詞 well。

questions.question: This is the _______ day of my life.
questions.explanation: Superlative adjective. "The" + superlative (-est or most + adj). "The happiest".
questions.japanese: 最上級は the + -est。the happiest = 一番幸せな。

questions.question: She runs _______ than her brother.
questions.explanation: Comparative adjective/adverb. "Than" = comparative signal. Fast → faster (not more fast).
questions.japanese: than = 比較級の印。fast → faster。

questions.question: The weather is _______ today than yesterday.
questions.explanation: Irregular comparative. "Good" → "better" → "best" (irregular). Not "more good".
questions.japanese: 不規則な比較級。good → better。

questions.question: Choose the correct word order:
questions.explanation: Standard English word order (SVO). English = Subject + Verb + Object + Time. "We (S) went (V) to church (O) yesterday (T)."
questions.japanese: 英語の基本語順は SVO（主語-動詞-目的語）。

questions.question: Choose the correct question:
questions.explanation: Question word order (inversion). Yes/No questions = Auxiliary + Subject + Verb. "Are (Aux) you (S) coming (V)...?"
questions.japanese: 疑問文は助動詞 + 主語 + 動詞の順。

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence:
questions.explanation: Adverb position with frequency words. "Never" goes before main verb (after be/auxiliary). "She never speaks".
questions.japanese: never は動詞の前。be動詞の後。

questions.question: Choose the correct negative:
questions.explanation: Present simple negative. "Doesn't" + base verb (no -s). "He doesn't like" (not likes).
questions.japanese: doesn't の後は動詞の原形。

questions.question: Choose the correct sentence:
questions.explanation: Indirect object position. "Give me the book" or "Give the book to me". Indirect object (me) before direct object (the book).
questions.japanese: give + 間接目的語 + 直接目的語。

questions.question: The shepherd _______ for the lost sheep.
questions.explanation: Phrasal verb "look after" vs. "search for". "Look after" = care for. "Search for" = try to find. Context = searching, so "searched" fits with "for".
questions.japanese: search for = 探す。look after = 世話する。

questions.question: He decided to _______ his old ways and start new.
questions.explanation: Verb distinction (leave/remain). "Leave" = go away from/abandon. "Remain/stay" = continue. Context = change.
questions.japanese: leave = 去る・やめる。remain = 残る。

questions.question: Please _______ me for my mistake.
questions.explanation: Vocabulary distinction (forgive/forget). "Forgive" = 許す. "Forget" = 忘れる. Context = pardon error.
questions.japanese: forgive = 許す。forget = 忘れる。

questions.question: She felt _______ peace after praying.
questions.explanation: Prepositional phrase "at peace". "At peace" = 平和な状態. Fixed phrase.
questions.japanese: at peace = 平和な状態で（決まった表現）。

questions.question: The light _______ away the darkness.
questions.explanation: Phrasal verb "drive away". "Drive away" = 追い払う. "Put away" = 片付ける. "Give away" = 配る.
questions.japanese: drive away = 追い払う。

questions.question: He offered a _______ of thanks to God.
questions.explanation: Noun distinction (prayer/praise/preach). "Prayer" = 祈り (noun). "Praise" = 賛美. "Preach" = 説教する (verb).
questions.japanese: prayer = 祈り（名詞）。praise = 賛美。

questions.question: They shared their bread _______ each other.
questions.explanation: Preposition with "share". "Share with" = 〜と分かち合う. Fixed collocation.
questions.japanese: share with = 〜と分かち合う。

questions.question: The story has a deep _______.
questions.explanation: Vocabulary (message vs. letter). "Message" = 伝える内容・意味. "Letter" = 手紙. Context = meaning.
questions.japanese: message = 伝えたいこと・教え。

questions.question: He showed great _______ to the poor.
questions.explanation: Noun form after adjective. "Great" = adjective, needs noun. "Kindness" = 親切さ (noun).
questions.japanese: 形容詞の後は名詞 kindness。

questions.question: She _______ her hands together in prayer.
questions.explanation: Vocabulary collocation. "Join hands" = 手を合わせる. "Fold hands" also possible. "Close hands" = 不自然。
questions.japanese: join hands = 手を合わせる。

questions.question: There _______ many people in the temple.
questions.explanation: Subject-verb agreement (plural). "People" = plural (no singular form). Use "are".
questions.japanese: people は複数形（単数形なし）。are を使う。

questions.question: I have _______ brothers and one sister.
questions.explanation: Cardinal vs. ordinal numbers. "Two" = 数量 (cardinal). "Second" = 順序 (ordinal). Counting brothers = two.
questions.japanese: 数量には基数詞 two。second は順序。

questions.question: This is the _______ time I have read this book.
questions.explanation: Ordinal numbers for sequence. "The first time" = 初めて. Ordinal numbers with "the".
questions.japanese: 順序には序数詞 first。the を付ける。

questions.question: She has lived here _______ ten years.
questions.explanation: Preposition for duration. "For" + duration (for ten years). "Since" + point in time (since 2010).
questions.japanese: 期間には for。since は起点。

questions.question: There isn't _______ milk in the refrigerator.
questions.explanation: Some vs. any in negative sentences. Negative sentences use "any" (not some). "No milk" = also possible but double negative with "isn't" wrong.
questions.japanese: 否定文では any。some は肯定文。

questions.question: _______ I use your pen, please?
questions.explanation: Modal for polite permission. "May" = very polite permission. "Can" = casual permission. "Could" = also polite.
questions.japanese: may = 丁寧な許可を求める。

questions.question: You _______ eat vegetables to be healthy.
questions.explanation: Modal for strong obligation/necessity. "Must" = 必須・強い義務. "Should" = すべき（advice）. "Can" = ability.
questions.japanese: must = 必須。強い義務。

questions.question: He _______ speak three languages.
questions.explanation: Modal for ability. "Can" = ability/possibility. "He can speak" = 話せる.
questions.japanese: can = 能力。〜できる。

questions.question: You _______ worry about the test. It's easy.
questions.explanation: Modal for lack of necessity. "Needn't" or "don't need to" = 必要ない. "Must not" = 禁止（違う意味）。
questions.japanese: needn't = 必要ない。must not は禁止。

questions.question: _______ you help me carry this box?
questions.explanation: Modal for requests. "Can you...?" or "Could you...?" = request. "Can" = casual, "Could" = polite.
questions.japanese: Can you...? = 〜してくれますか？（依頼）。

questions.question: I need to _______ my hair before the meeting.
questions.explanation: Irregular verb past = present form. "Cut" = cut-cut-cut (same form). No "cutted".
questions.japanese: cut は不規則動詞で過去形も cut。

questions.question: She _______ a white dress to the party.
questions.explanation: Irregular verb wear. Wear → wore → worn. Past tense = "wore" (not weared).
questions.japanese: wear → wore → worn。過去形は wore。

questions.question: He _______ me his phone number.
questions.explanation: Irregular verb give. Give → gave → given. Past tense = "gave".
questions.japanese: give → gave → given。過去形は gave。

questions.question: Please _______ quiet in the library.
questions.explanation: Multiple correct options (synonyms). "Keep quiet", "stay quiet", "be quiet" = all correct! Context = state.
questions.japanese: keep/stay/be quiet = みな静かにして（全部正解）。

questions.question: I _______ my keys at home this morning.
questions.explanation: Leave vs. forget. "Leave" = 置き忘れる（場所を指定）. "Forget" = 忘れる（物・ことを思い出せない）. "Left at home" = correct.
questions.japanese: leave = 置き忘れる（場所あり）。forget = 忘れる。

questions.question: The store is _______ the bank and the post office.
questions.explanation: Between vs. among. "Between" = 2 things. "Among" = 3+ things. "Bank and post office" = 2 things.
questions.japanese: between = 2つの間。among = 3つ以上の間。

questions.question: She _______ her friend at the station.
questions.explanation: Meet vs. know. "Meet" = 会う（初めてまたは特定の時間）. "Know" = 知っている（状態）. Context = station = planned meeting.
questions.japanese: meet = 会う（一度きりまたは予定）。know = 知る（継続）。

questions.question: I _______ up at 6 o'clock every day.
questions.explanation: Present simple with frequency. "Every day" = habit. Present simple "wake". (wake → woke → woken).
questions.japanese: every day = 現在形。wake → woke → woken。

questions.question: He _______ his leg in the accident.
questions.explanation: Irregular verb break. Break → broke → broken. Past tense = "broke" (not breaked).
questions.japanese: break → broke → broken。過去形は broke。

questions.question: This is a _______ situation.
questions.explanation: Adjective form. "Hard" = adjective (難しい・硬い). "Hardly" = adverb (ほとんど～ない). "Hardness" = noun.
questions.japanese: hard = 形容詞（難しい）。hardly = 副詞（ほとんど～ない）。
